evidence_refs.quote: We investigate whether a quantization-aware saliency (QAS) score can identify parameters whose protection from low-bit quantization reduces post-quantization error more effectively than standard quantization-agnostic saliency methods. The proposed QAS score approximates per-coefficient post-quantization loss contribution as $H_{ii}(w_i - q_i)^2$, where $H_{ii} = \mathbb{E}[x_i^2]$ is the diagonal Hessian element and $(w_i - q_i)$ is the quantization error.
